name: IKEA
message: [AI generated] IKEA is a Swedish-based multinational company that designs and sells ready-to-assemble furniture, kitchen appliances, and home accessories. It's known worldwide as an industry leader for affordable, modern, flat-packed furniture. Founded in 1943 by Ingvar Kamprad, IKEA has over 400 stores in 50 countries, making it one of the largest furniture retailers globally.
